notableEvents.label: Jorge Soler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Soler grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Nolan Schanuel out at 2nd. Jorge Soler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw singles on a ground ball to center fielder Mike Trout. Dansby Swanson to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw grounds out, third baseman Yoán Moncada to first baseman Nolan Schanuel.

notableEvents.label: Ian Happ GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ian Happ grounds into a double play, second baseman Oswald Peraza to shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Alex Bregman out at 2nd. Ian Happ out at 1st.
